interpretationBoundaries: This is a same-context confirmed Devnet snapshot, not a permanent population total or a Mainnet Beta claim.
Profile attribute bytes prove stored values only; they do not prove that health, energy, stamina, mining power, build power, or defense is consumed by a current action.
Chunk and Game progress PDAs use the same seed text but different deriving program IDs, so equal owners and GlobalConfig keys still produce different account addresses.
The snapshot does not prove that the deployed binaries are reproducible from the current dirty working tree; source consumers and deployed account evidence remain separately scoped.
